The pose should feature the parents sitting side-by-side on a sofa, with the one girl, one older boy and one younger. All of the three children sitting between the parents.Dress them in semi-formal attire in coordinated, neutral tones (beige, light brown, white). The lighting should be warm and natural, against a plain cream background. Add a small vase of flowers as a prop on the side."

title: Timeless Legacy – Low-Key Black & White Family Side-Profile Portrait
fullPrompt:
Create a classic low-key black-and-white studio portrait of a family of four arranged in a staggered side-profile composition, all facing right. Maintain accurate identity and face matching to the provided reference image for all four subjects — preserve exact facial structure, proportions, skin texture, hairlines.Mid-chest shot (cropped from mid chest upward), tight vertical composition. All four subjects are wearing solid matte black t-shirts with no logos, no reflective elements — blending subtly into shadow while maintaining garment structure.
Diagonal alignment from front-left (father closest to camera) to back-right (youngest child farthest). Overlapping layered composition.
CRITICAL — Natural Height-Based Staggered Arrangement: Subjects must be arranged in realistic descending height order consistent with a natural family hierarchy. The father (foreground) is the tallest, followed slightly behind by the mother, who is slightly shorter. Behind her stands the first child, clearly shorter than the mother, and, in the far background, the second child, the shortest of all. The top of each subject’s head forms a gradual downward diagonal slope from left (tallest father) to right (shortest child). Eye levels must also progressively lower in the same sequence. This height progression must appear anatomically natural and realistic, not artificially aligned or equalized. Maintain accurate proportional scaling and perspective depth consistent with real-world height differences. True monochrome (black and white), high contrast, deep blacks, smooth midtone transitions. Dramatic chiaroscuro lighting with a single directional key light from camera-right, slightly above eye level, no equipment/object visible in frame. Strong shadow falloff into pure black background. Deep negative space on the left.Sharp catchlights in all eyes from a small gridded softbox. Crisp highlight definition on nose bridges, cheekbones, lips, and jawlines.
Father (foreground, sharpest focus): His expression appears steady and confident with a subtle smile. His gaze is fixed forward, conveying strength and leadership. Visible individual hairs, strong skin micro-contrast, wear a black t-shirt fading into shadow.Mother (second): She has a soft, graceful smile (upper teeth visible). Long voluminous wavy hair, subtle earrings, smooth skin, and wear a black outfit.
Child (third): Her expression shows youthful curiosity and positivity, with a subtle smile (upper teeth visible), slightly pulled-back natural hair, and a simple black outfit.
Child (background): He looks calm and thoughtful. His face carries innocence and quiet confidence, as if observing something meaningful ahead. Lens look: 85mm–135mm telephoto compression, no distortion.
Aperture look: f/5.6–f/8 layered depth, foreground sharpest with subtle gradual falloff.
Ultra-detailed skin texture, realistic pores, cinematic tonal grading, professional studio photography, timeless, museum-quality.
4K resolution detail, ultra-sharp, high micro-contrast, refined tonal range.Aspect ratio 4:5
Negative prompt:
low quality, blur, head crop, frame crop, over exposure, visible equipment, equal head height, flat alignment, incorrect height proportions, unrealistic scaling
author: Admin

title: Watercolor Family Huddle Portrait – Mixed Media Fine Art Family Cluster
fullPrompt:
Use the uploaded image(s) only for strict identity references. Each subject must match their respective face, proportions, skin tone, hairstyle, and facial features exactly. No identity drift or beautification.
Main Concept
Create a high-detail mixed-media watercolor family portrait capturing a warm, joyful “huddle” moment Composition & Framing
Do not detect the subject's pose details from the provided reference image.
Aspect ratio: 1:1 or 4:5
Tight, intimate group composition
Subjects arranged naturally in a close cluster (slight overlap)
Head-and-shoulders framing
Eye-level camera
Subjects (Dynamic / Flexible)
Number of people: based on input images (2–6 subjects supported)
Arrange subjects in a balanced triangular or clustered composition
Adults slightly behind or framing the group, children naturally in front (if present)
Natural arm placement: light embrace, shoulders touching, subtle interaction
Expressions & Emotion
Genuine smiles (natural, not forced)
Warm, candid, emotionally connected
Bright eyes with realistic catchlights
Art Style & Rendering
Mixed-media watercolor + photorealistic facial detail
Faces: sharp, detailed (skin texture, eyes, teeth)
Edges: dissolve into soft watercolor washes and splashes
Minimal fine linework, mostly soft gradients
Color System (Flexible)
Clothing: soft coordinated tones (pastels / neutrals / family palette), no short clothing
Skin tones: natural with warm undertones
Background: white paper texture with abstract watercolor splashes

(soft yellow, green, blue — adjustable)
Lighting
High-key soft studio lighting
Even illumination, minimal harsh shadows
Soft gradients on face contours
Detailing
Fine hair strands blending into brush strokes
Subtle skin texture (not overly smooth)
Watercolor bleed and splatter effects
Quality Tags
Ultra-detailed, 8K, professional digital painting, watercolor illustration, clean composition

title: DANIEL – Cozy Pastel Designer Room with Pixar-Style Chibi Creative Collage Portrait

Beside his are giant colorful vertical letters spelling ‘DANIEL,’ each letter glossy and toy-like, with inspirational words written on them: Dynamic, Artistic, Nimble, Iridescent, Earthbound, Luminous. Around each letter are cute chibi-style miniature guy based on the attached image characters doing creative deigning and graphic designer activities. The room is filled with warm ambient fairy lights, pastel decorations, motivational notes, and cute home accessories and icons for graphic designer. Include handwritten-style wall signs saying ‘I am a strategic designer!’ and ‘Today’s Plan: Design, Create, Repeat.’ Use soft cinematic lighting, warm tones, shallow depth of field, ultra-detailed textures, dreamy atmosphere, Pixar-inspired character design, realistic skin details, and high-quality digital art.
